response.overview: Director’s Cut Version Now Streaming. Hoping to rekindle their fading romance, Lin Yi and Xu Cheng escape to Lijiang — only to fight more than ever. Drunk and alone one night, Lin Yi meets Nick, a singer staying at the same guesthouse, and blacks out in his bed. As blackout nights pile up, the three men's lives become hopelessly entangled. In the Lijiang spring breeze, who is the real love, and who is just passing through?
response.title: Black Out!!
